items.source_problem: Strict-scope clean path can coexist with global legacy warnings.
items.future_prevention: Keep strict-scope verdict and global legacy verdict separate.
items.script_first_remediation_path: Automate dual-verdict renderer in filter post-processor.

items.source_problem: Legacy language hits require durable backlog instead of ad-hoc narrative.
items.future_prevention: Always emit categorized backlog JSON/MD/CSV when global WARN remains.

items.source_problem: Historical report bundles can carry stale pending finalization markers.
items.future_prevention: Classify stale markers explicitly before closure verdict.
items.script_first_remediation_path: Periodic pending-field scanner for recent report bundles.

items.source_problem: Registered taskpack payload growth needs explicit retention semantics.
items.future_prevention: Attach retention class in admission and periodic inventory rollups.
items.script_first_remediation_path: Retention inventory emitter with quarantine candidates.
